completed: WORK-0017: phase-0/1 definitions + Phase 0->1 transition (PR #20, merged).
WORK-0016: .hedl-tier no longer ships a hardcoded absolute path (PR #21, merged).
WORK-0019: startup.sh printf RCE verified false positive; regression guard + evidence note (PR #22, merged).

WORK-0020: install.py now validates SKILL_ROOT/repo containment on every tiers.json projection/init source+target before any write/delete. Added _resolve_contained + _validate_tier_paths; guarded cmd_install/cmd_status/cmd_doctor. 12 containment tests.
decisions: WORK-0020 containment uses Path.resolve(strict=False) + parents-membership (not startswith). The follow flag mirrors each sink: sources + init targets follow terminal symlinks (read/copy/move through them); projection targets do not (unlink-then-write, and symlink-mode targets legitimately link into SKILL_ROOT).

Security panel cycle 1 found 3 SIGNIFICANT terminal-symlink bypasses (source copy2, init copytree, init archive-move) + cmd_status gap — all fixed. Cycle 2 confirmed closed; its lingering MINOR (cmd_doctor read_bytes read-through) is a false positive: read_bytes is guarded by an is_symlink->DRIFT check, unreachable through a symlink, and already covered by test_doctor_detects_workflow_symlink_drift.
Out of WORK-0020 scope (noted, not done): cmd_migrate audit-trail logging; tiers.json integrity/signature check.
notes: Phase 1. WORK-0020 done on branch fix/install-path-containment (not yet PR'd). Next BLOCKING: WORK-0021 (am_i_done.py [verify] cmd allow-list / safe execution). NOTE: am_i_done.py's _run_declared_check already uses shlex.split + shell=False (no shell=True) and checks shutil.which — WORK-0021's allow-list requirement may be partially satisfied already; audit before implementing.
